---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="section">
<p class="section-title">Coursework & Code</p>

<p>Graduate coursework completed as part of my PhD in Watershed Science at Colorado State University. 
All code is publicly available on GitHub.</p>

<hr>

<h3>ESS 523c: Water Resources and Environmental Data Science</h3>
<p><em>Spring 2026 · Instructor: Dr. Mike Johnson</em></p>
<p>Applied spatial data science for water resources using R, sf, and Quarto. Topics include 
spatial distance analysis, coordinate reference systems, hydrologic network analysis, 
interactive mapping, and federal policy applications of spatial data.</p>

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Lab</th>
      <th>Topic</th>
      <th>Code</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Lab 1</td>
      <td>Colorado River Basin hydrology pipeline using USGS dataRetrieval</td>
      <td><a href="https://karenthdworsky.github.io/csu-523c/LAB01.html" style="color: #7ab3cc;">View</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Lab 2</td>
      <td>Spatial distances, projections, and the 100-mile border zone</td>
      <td><a href="https://karenthdworsky.github.io/csu-523c/Lab02.html" style="color: #7ab3cc;">View</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<p style="margin-top: 1rem;"><a href="https://github.com/karenthdworsky/csu-523c" style="color: #7ab3cc;">→ View full repository on GitHub</a></p>

<hr>

<h3>GEOL 554: Remote Sensing</h3>
<p><em>Spring 2026</em></p>
<p>Graduate remote sensing methods with applications in earth and environmental science. 
Topics include hyperspectral analysis, image classification, thermal infrared processing, 
passive microwave remote sensing, and SAR backscatter interpretation.</p>

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Lab</th>
      <th>Topic</th>
      <th>Code</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Lab 4</td>
      <td>Rain-on-snow detection using MODIS and Sentinel-1 SAR, December 2025 atmospheric river event</td>
      <td><a href="https://code.earthengine.google.com/634869be55c5cf9a318f4b18df9120b0" style="color: #7ab3cc;">View in GEE</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Final Project</td>
      <td>MODIS snow cover time series for the December 2025 atmospheric river event, Entiat and Wenatchee basins</td>
      <td><a href="https://code.earthengine.google.com/588ce9473c59e5df6f398d1baa3432ba" style="color: #7ab3cc;">View in GEE</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<hr>

<p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.85rem;"><em>Additional courses and labs will be added as they are completed.</em></p>

</div>
```
